name: M.A. Griffin & Sons Pawn Shop
description_short: M.A. Griffin & Sons Pawn Shop in Bakersfield, CA offers collateral-based loans, jewelry, electronics, and used vintage items with a focus on friendly customer service.
description_long:
M.A. Griffin & Sons Pawn Shop has established itself as a fixture in Bakersfield's local pawn industry, operating from 1234 19th St in Kern County. The business identifies as Latino-owned and maintains standard pawn shop operations for customers seeking quick collateral-based loans or browsing inventory.

The shop offers a diverse inventory that includes jewelry, electronics, gaming equipment, and musical items—exceeding typical pawn shop selections. They accept collateral loans and sell used and vintage consignment merchandise. Payment options include credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments. Operating hours are 9:00 A.M. to 6:00 P.M. Monday through Saturday, with Sunday closures.

Customer service is consistently highlighted as a distinguishing feature, with staff members Jake and Cody specifically mentioned for friendly and professional interactions. The shop emphasizes transparency and honesty during transactions, making customers feel confident about loan valuations and fairness in dealings. The inventory presentation is described as well-organized, appealing to both casual browsers and serious buyers.

However, potential customers should note that the business has not completed verification on CreditDoc, and some reviews mention pricing concerns and occasional discrepancies in item valuations. The shop currently has no verified reviews on the platform, making it difficult to independently assess current service quality or loan terms. Pricing appears mixed—some customers report fair pricing while others felt certain loan offers or product prices didn't align with expectations.
pros: Staff members like Jake and Cody consistently praised for friendly, courteous, and professional service
Diverse inventory exceeding typical pawn shop selections—electronics, jewelry, gaming equipment, and musical items
Transparent and honest transaction practices with customers confident in loan valuations
Well-organized inventory presentation that appeals to diverse customers
Accepts multiple payment methods including credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments
Latino-owned business serving the local Bakersfield community
Extended operating hours—open 9 A.M. to 6 P.M. six days per week
cons: Business has not completed verification process on CreditDoc, limiting credibility
No verified customer reviews currently available on the platform to validate service claims
Some customer feedback indicates pricing concerns and discrepancies in item valuations
Mixed pricing feedback with some customers reporting high prices for loans and certain products
Limited transparency about specific loan terms, interest rates, or APR charges
best_for: Consumers seeking quick collateral-based loans in Bakersfield with preference for personalized service
Buyers searching for used electronics, jewelry, gaming equipment, or vintage items
Local residents preferring to support Latino-owned businesses in Kern County
diagnosis: M.A. Griffin & Sons Pawn Shop is best for Bakersfield residents needing quick collateral-based loans or seeking used electronics and jewelry with staff-focused customer service. Primary caveat: lack of verification status and absence of verified reviews make it impossible to independently validate current loan terms, pricing practices, or service quality before engaging.
